commodities.name: Wheat Flour
commodities.description: Ground wheat, a staple for bakers and travelers.

commodities.name: Aged Cheese
commodities.description: A firm wheel of cheese aged in cool cellars for months.

commodities.name: Dried Meat
commodities.description: Salted and sun-dried strips of beef, perfect for long journeys.

commodities.name: Fresh Fish
commodities.description: Freshly caught river trout, best consumed within the day.

commodities.name: Rye Bread
commodities.description: Dense dark bread baked from coarsely milled rye grain.

commodities.name: Apple
commodities.description: A crisp red apple picked from orchard trees.

commodities.name: Potato
commodities.description: A hearty root vegetable, common in peasant stews.

commodities.name: Carrot
commodities.description: An orange root vegetable prized for its sweetness.

commodities.name: Cabbage
commodities.description: A large leafy head, often pickled or used in stews.

commodities.name: Salt
commodities.description: Crystalline mineral essential for preserving food and enhancing flavor.

commodities.name: Honey
commodities.description: Golden wildflower honey harvested from forest apiaries.

commodities.name: Spice Blend
commodities.description: An exotic mix of cinnamon, clove, and pepper from distant lands.

commodities.name: Smoked Salmon
commodities.description: Rich salmon fillets slowly cured over oak wood smoke.

commodities.name: Garlic Braid
commodities.description: A braided string of pungent garlic bulbs, also rumored to repel undead.

commodities.name: Egg Basket
commodities.description: A wicker basket holding a dozen fresh farm eggs.

commodities.name: Ale
commodities.description: A frothy amber ale brewed in the local tradition.

commodities.name: Red Wine
commodities.description: A full-bodied red from sun-drenched southern vineyards.

commodities.name: White Wine
commodities.description: A crisp white wine with notes of green apple and citrus.

commodities.name: Mead
commodities.description: Sweet fermented honey wine, a favorite of northern warriors.

commodities.name: Dwarven Spirits
commodities.description: Potent distilled liquor from deep mountain stills, not for the faint-hearted.

commodities.name: Cider
commodities.description: Fermented apple juice with a tart, refreshing finish.

commodities.name: Milk
commodities.description: Fresh goat milk, best consumed within a day of milking.

commodities.name: Herbal Tea
commodities.description: A calming blend of chamomile and mint leaves for brewing.

commodities.name: Blackberry Wine
commodities.description: A deep purple wine made from wild forest blackberries.

commodities.name: Ginger Beer
commodities.description: A fizzy non-alcoholic brew with a sharp ginger bite.

commodities.name: Elven Cordial
commodities.description: A fragrant golden liqueur crafted by elven vintners, revitalizing to body and spirit.

commodities.name: Iron Ore
commodities.description: Raw iron ore extracted from hillside mines.

commodities.name: Copper Ore
commodities.description: Green-streaked copper ore, useful for alloys and coinage.

commodities.name: Silver Ore
commodities.description: Gleaming ore veined with silver, prized by jewelers and enchanters.

commodities.name: Gold Ore
commodities.description: Heavy ore flecked with pure gold, coveted across every realm.

commodities.name: Mithral Ore
commodities.description: Exceptionally rare silvery ore, lighter and stronger than steel.

commodities.name: Tin Ore
commodities.description: Soft tin ore commonly alloyed with copper to make bronze.

commodities.name: Coal
commodities.description: Dense black mineral fuel essential for smelting furnaces.

commodities.name: Adamantine Ore
commodities.description: Incredibly dense dark ore, nearly indestructible once forged.

commodities.name: Zinc Ore
commodities.description: Blue-grey ore used in brass alloys and rust-proofing.

commodities.name: Lead Ore
commodities.description: Heavy dull ore, used in ammunition and alchemical shielding.

commodities.name: Obsidian Chunk
commodities.description: Volcanic glass, razor-sharp when knapped into blades.

commodities.name: Healing Herb
commodities.description: A bright green herb with regenerative properties when brewed.

commodities.name: Nightshade
commodities.description: A deadly poisonous berry used by assassins and alchemists alike.

commodities.name: Wolfsbane

commodities.name: Mandrake Root
commodities.description: A humanoid-shaped root that shrieks when pulled from the earth.

commodities.name: Chamomile
commodities.description: Delicate white flowers brewed into a soothing calming tea.

commodities.name: Sage Leaf
commodities.description: Aromatic grey-green leaves used in cooking and purification rituals.

commodities.name: Bloodthorn
commodities.description: A thorny crimson vine whose sap accelerates blood clotting.

commodities.name: Ghostcap Mushroom
commodities.description: A translucent fungus that glows faintly, used in ethereal potions.

commodities.name: Feverfew
commodities.description: Small daisy-like flowers renowned for reducing fevers and headaches.

commodities.name: Ironwood Bark
commodities.description: Tough bark stripped from ironwood trees, brewed into fortifying tonics.

commodities.name: Moonpetal

commodities.name: Linen

commodities.name: Silk
commodities.description: Luxurious smooth fabric spun from the cocoons of silkworms.

commodities.description: Thick sheep wool, warm and durable when spun into yarn.

commodities.name: Cotton
commodities.description: Soft white fiber harvested from cotton plants in warm fields.

commodities.name: Leather Hide

commodities.name: Fur Pelt

commodities.name: Dyed Cloth
commodities.description: Brightly colored fabric treated with indigo, madder, or woad dyes.

commodities.name: Gemstone

commodities.name: Pearl
commodities.description: A lustrous white pearl harvested from river oysters.

commodities.name: Ivory Tusk

commodities.name: Amber Piece
commodities.description: A translucent golden fossil resin, sometimes containing ancient insects.

commodities.name: Jade Stone
commodities.description: A smooth green stone carved into amulets and figurines.

commodities.name: Perfume Vial
commodities.description: A small crystal vial of intoxicating floral perfume.

commodities.name: Fine Wine Vintage
commodities.description: A rare vintage from a celebrated vineyard, decades old.

commodities.name: Saffron

commodities.name: Gold Filigree
commodities.description: Delicate ornamental gold wirework used in fine jewelry.

commodities.name: Mithral Ingot

commodities.name: Weapon Grip

commodities.name: Bowstring

commodities.name: Weapon Pommel

commodities.description: The trigger and latch assembly for a crossbow.

commodities.description: An impossibly hard dark metal bar used in legendary weapons.

commodities.name: Bronze Ingot
commodities.description: A warm-toned alloy bar of copper and tin, sturdy and corrosion-resistant.

commodities.name: Iron Plate

commodities.name: Leather Strips

commodities.name: Chain Links

commodities.name: Rivets

commodities.name: Steel Plate
commodities.description: A precisely forged sheet of steel for superior armor crafting.

commodities.name: Scale Pieces

commodities.name: Helmet Liner

commodities.name: Buckle Set
commodities.description: A matched set of brass buckles and clasps for securing armor straps.

commodities.name: Mithral Mesh
commodities.description: Finely woven mithral rings, feather-light yet incredibly protective.

commodities.name: Hardened Leather
commodities.description: Leather boiled in wax and shaped into rigid protective panels.

commodities.name: Sulfur
commodities.description: Yellow crystalline powder with a pungent smell, key in fire magic.

commodities.name: Charcoal Powder
commodities.description: Fine black powder ground from burned wood, used in ink and alchemy.

commodities.name: Quicksilver

commodities.name: Phoenix Ash
commodities.description: Shimmering golden ash from a phoenix rebirth, radiating warmth.

commodities.name: Dragon Blood
commodities.description: Thick crimson blood from a dragon, thrumming with arcane power.

commodities.name: Moonstone Dust
commodities.description: Ground moonstone that glows faintly, used in divination and warding.

commodities.name: Saltpeter

commodities.name: Elemental Dust

commodities.description: Dried bat droppings, a classic component in fireball incantations.

commodities.name: Ectoplasm
commodities.description: Translucent spectral residue collected from haunted sites.

commodities.name: Arcane Crystal
commodities.description: A humming crystal saturated with raw magical energy.

commodities.name: Rope

commodities.name: Lantern Oil
commodities.description: A flask of refined oil that burns cleanly in lanterns and lamps.

commodities.name: Candle
commodities.description: A tallow candle providing several hours of dim light.

commodities.name: Ink Bottle
commodities.description: A small bottle of black iron-gall ink for writing and drawing.

commodities.name: Parchment

commodities.name: Lockpick Set
commodities.description: A leather roll containing an assortment of fine picks and tension wrenches.

commodities.name: Whetstone

commodities.name: Torch

commodities.name: Nails Pouch

commodities.description: A small corked glass bottle for potions and alchemical samples.

commodities.name: Chalk

commodities.name: Water Essence
